ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_number" TEXT /* The number assigned to the vehicle */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., train, bus) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the vehicle (e.g., in service, out of service) */,
  "operational_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle began operation */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* The manufacturer of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* The model of the vehicle */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* The type of fuel used by the vehicle (e.g., diesel, electric) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* The maximum passenger capacity of the vehicle */,
  "service_history" TEXT /* A brief history of the vehicle's service and maintenance records */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the schedule is for */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route the vehicle is traveling */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Direction of travel (e.g., northbound, southbound) */,
  "leave_time" TEXT /* Scheduled departure time from the initial location */,
  "stop_time" TEXT /* Scheduled stop time at intermediate locations */,
  "arrive_time" TEXT /* Scheduled arrival time at the final destination */,
  "estimated_load" INTEGER /* Estimated number of passengers at departure */,
  "pattern_distance" REAL /* Distance to be traveled according to the pattern */,
  "location_distance" REAL /* Distance traveled from the last location */,
  "actual_leave_time" TEXT /* Actual departure time from the initial location */,
  "actual_arrive_time" TEXT /* Actual arrival time at the final destination */,
  "delay_reason" TEXT /* Reason for any delays (e.g., mechanical issues, traffic) */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the schedule status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES schedule_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "route_number" TEXT /* The number assigned to the route */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the route */,
  "start_location" TEXT /* Starting location of the route */,
  "end_location" TEXT /* Ending location of the route */,
  "route_type" TEXT /* Type of route (e.g., express, local) */,
  "operational_hours" TEXT /* Operational hours of the route */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of service (e.g., every 15 minutes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stops" (
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stop */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route the stop is on */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the stop is situated */,
  "sequence" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the stop on the route */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the stop */,
  "stop_type" TEXT /* Type of stop (e.g., station, platform) */,
  "wheelchair_accessible" INTEGER /* Whether the stop is accessible for wheelchair users */,
  "bicycle_parking" INTEGER /* Whether the stop has bicycle parking facilities */,
  "shelter" INTEGER /* Whether the stop has a shelter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stops_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stops_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "x_coordinate" REAL /* X-coordinate of the location */,
  "y_coordinate" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* The city where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* The state where the location is situated */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* The zip code of the location */,
  "nearest_road" TEXT /* The nearest road to the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_loads" (
  "load_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each load record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stop */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the load count */,
  "load_count" INTEGER /* Number of passengers at the stop */,
  "onboard_count" INTEGER /* Number of passengers who boarded at the stop */,
  "alight_count" INTEGER /* Number of passengers who alighted at the stop */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("load_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_loads_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_loads_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("stop_id") REFERENCES stops ("stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_loads_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "train_mileage" (
  "mileage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mileage record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "mileage" REAL /* Mileage of the vehicle */,
  "last_service_date" TEXT /* Date of the last service */,
  "next_service_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled service */,
  "maintenance_interval" INTEGER /* Interval (in days) between maintenance services */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mileage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_train_mileage_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., sensor, manual input) */,
  "reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the data source (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedule_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the schedule status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the schedule status */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the status (e.g., minor, major) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the location record */,
  "x_coordinate" REAL /* X-coordinate of the vehicle's location */,
  "y_coordinate" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the vehicle's location */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed of the vehicle */,
  "bearing" REAL /* Bearing (direction) of the vehicle */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the vehicle */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the location data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_locations_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)
